In Their Own Words

Debut Single · The Origin Story

Hulkamania Forever

Cinematic Avenger

⚡ 45,000+ plays and counting

Intro He told us to believe. He stood for something more. And when the world dropped the leg… He kicked out at two. Verse 1 SummerSlam '88, I was just a kid Saw the red and yellow, changed everything I did Said my prayers, took my vits, flexed in the mirror Hulk and Savage in the ring — heroes couldn't be clearer Andre fell, the crowd went insane I learned to fight back and never feel shame Chorus Hulkamania forever, runnin' wild in my soul He made us all feel stronger, made the broken feel whole Ripped that shirt, dropped that leg, heard the three-count roar And though he's gone now… His spirit slams forevermore Bridge He told us to train… Told us to believe… Now the ring's gone quiet — But the legend still breathes. He's bodyslamming heaven… On that gold belt chain Rest easy, Hulkster. You dropped the leg on death itself. Hulkamania… Lives forever.
